text:
astrology like all the
modern science needs to be modernized in its interpretation
and not in basic philosophy. Try to develop a systematic
approach towards the mundane astrology. People just con and
make money in name of parampara. The common techniques will
give you a fair edge over other astrologers who do not
believe or use these techniques properly. For example I
have used for example 22nd drekkana for predicting veerappan
death.
Future of Veerappan – the forest brigand! Monday, 26 April , 2004, 17:25
The forest brigand Veerappan was born on 18th January 1952 at 8.41 am (source –
Astrology Magazine), and has succeeded to exist as a bandit for more than 15 years
now. Whether he proves to be a strong person physically and mentally is quite
debatable but of course his planetary positions had been strong enough to save him

from all sorts of problems.
Veerappan’s Longevity
Veerappan managed to live a long life, in spite of various search operations against
him.
